What it carries

The object

Aluminum. Glass. Paper.

4.26″ e-ink touch · 95 g · 7.5 mm thin · 7–10 days per charge · iPhone & Android

The honest part

What we won't pretend.

On iPhone, OnePage is built for triage, not typing. Apple reserves free-text replies for its own watch — so on iOS you read everything, answer calls, and send quick responses; on Android you reply to anything. OnePage Messages, our own channel, is fully two-way on both. We'd rather tell you now than surprise you later.
